title: chamaecrista × patyensis
intro: Chamaecrista × patyensis, also known as Paty's sensitive plant, is a hybrid species of flowering plant that belongs to the Fabaceae family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Chamaecrista × patyensis include its ability to reduce inflammation, act as an antibacterial agent, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made by infusing its leaves in hot water or oil to create teas, tinctures, and topical creams, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
